invariants: Never read a canonical prompt body during metadata_for_role or selection.
Verify tactic ID, path and SHA-256 before returning prompt content.
Unknown maturity selects zero tactics and the base method.
Use only confirmed relations for normative routing; proposed relations are audit-only.
Apply P2 ranking in order: exact output, need-tag count, optional-input gaps, collisions, tactic_id.
Zero is valid, one is default, two require distinct outputs or dependency, and more than two rejects.

Router.constructor: Router(role_matrix: dict, routing_contract: dict, catalog: CatalogLoader)
invariants: Only fact claims with provenance may set scoring signals.
Only loop_planning accepts the primary bottleneck and route order.
Preserve the input state_revision unchanged in every route node.
Insufficient or tied evidence produces needs_evidence and Refinar minimo_viavel.
Parallel nodes share one revision, distinct owners, disjoint write sets and no new-output dependency.
Return every violation in deterministic precedence order and one primary code.
Never repair missing critical fields by inference.
Reuse P4 schema and semantic rules without weakening them.

methods: commit(project_id: str, record: dict, expected_revision: int, expected_head_hash: str) -> dict
invariants: Resolve and contain every real path; reject symlinks in write components.
Acquire an exclusive per-project lock and repeat CAS after lock.
Append by same-filesystem temp copy plus atomic rename; prior bytes remain an exact prefix.
One committed transaction advances one revision regardless of event count.
Exact canonical replay is noop; identifier reuse with different content rejects.
Ledger is authoritative; stale snapshot is rebuilt; ledger corruption is quarantined and read-only.
Immutable identity is stored separately so both derived caches can be rebuilt exactly.
An abandoned lock is removed only after same-host dead-process proof and a durable recovery report.
Preparation is read-only and returns serializable envelopes.
Specialist outputs remain staged proposals until planner cross-validation.
Commit is local state only and never an external platform mutation.
No host adapter can bypass router, validator or state store.
Claude, Codex and generic adapters use the same command IDs and state root.
Alias changes presentation only; it never changes role, authority, state or output contract.
P5 adapters expose no external-write method.

orchestration_flow: apply outside-loop prerequisite and bottleneck precedence
construct route nodes and safe parallel groups
select tactic metadata without reading prompt bodies
load only the selected zero, one or two verified bodies
emit specialist envelope against the immutable revision
validate exact 22-field handoffs and staged write sets
integration_resolutions: prepare_route replays the authoritative ledger and rejects a mismatched input revision
every serialized route carries its canonical routing input and hash and must be reproduced by Router before use
a specialist command must own the selected route node
every non-planner route node requires exactly one valid 22-field handoff
validated handoffs issue a route-bound receipt required by transaction construction and commit
transaction evidence must resolve to routed or inline evidence and P5 rejects every external mutation request
wheel installation includes all eight runtime assets and the installed console script resolves the canonical command table
unknown CLI failures become ERR_RUNTIME_INTERNAL without a secret-bearing traceback

error_contract.unknown_error_behavior: Return ERR_RUNTIME_INTERNAL with no state write and no secret-bearing traceback in user output.

test_matrix: metadata-only selection proves zero prompt body reads
zero, one, two and rejected-three tactic cardinality
confirmed relation effects and proposed relation no-effect
parallel read safety and write collision rejection
event and transaction exact replay noop
tampered replay, stale revision and broken chain rejection
crash before and after ledger commit-point recovery
real abandoned-process lock proof, report and recovery
route, handoff, validation receipt and transaction binding
six canonical command and six alias equivalence
Claude, Codex and generic adapter envelope equivalence
canonical source clean and 100 prompts unchanged
non_goals: No real migration execution in P5.
No CRM, campaign, file-outside-state or API write.
No credential resolution or authorization grant; those belong to P6.
No prompt rewriting, editorial correction, merge or removal.
No final public release or redistribution decision; those belong to P8.
